notes: Solid Pong implementation with proper physics, angle-based bouncing, and audio; AI only tracks ball when moving toward it (correct), but serve direction logic is inverted (winner should serve, not receive) and ball speed escalation can make it nearly unplayable at high rallies.
An excellent, fully-featured Pong clone with great audio and game states, though the paddle collision logic has a slight risk of tunneling at maximum ball speed.
A solid and mostly complete Pong build with proper scoring and state flow, but collision logic is somewhat brittle and the AI/serve flow keeps it short of a top-tier implementation.
